package.name: pipeline_watchdog
package.description:
pipeline_watchdog_node — independent supervisor for the autonomy stack.
The uDV watchdogs /dv/status for DVPC liveness, which covers the pipeline being DEAD. This node covers the pipeline being ALIVE BUT SICK: it arms off /dv/status == DV_RUNNING and supervises the data liveness of the topics whose staleness leaves the car still driving on stale state (/slam/pose, /odom, /ctrl/cmd_internal). On a trip it latches /watchdog/emergency, which mission_control turns into /force_ebs + DV_EMERGENCY so the uDV drives the AS state machine to AS Emergency.
Deliberately NOT a lifecycle node and NOT in AUTONOMY_NODE_ORDER — it must keep supervising when the stack it supervises is broken.
See docs/WATCHDOG.md.
